To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Hi Priya,

We're excited to welcome Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment. Project Helios is NovaBridge's data integration platform—designed to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Given Meridian's focus on reliable live-data pipelines and a smooth path to UAT, Helios should give your team the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

To get started, we'll send your access credentials and onboarding documentation separately within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, a few next steps:

1. Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup (as discussed, target by 2026-07-12).
2. Your team will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.
3. We'll aim to resolve remaining setup items ahead of the stakeholder demo on 2026-07-25.

For technical questions, please reach out to Derek Okafor (Technical Lead) at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination and scheduling, contact Sarah Chen (Project Manager) at s.chen@novabridge.com. Either of us is happy to help.

Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions—we're looking forward to partnering with you and the Meridian team.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

content.text: I've reviewed the draft — now I'll rewrite it to be more personalized and professional and save it back.

input.content:
To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to Project Helios – Onboarding and Next Steps for Meridian Group

Dear Priya,

On behalf of everyone at NovaBridge, I am delighted to welcome you and the Meridian Group team to the Project Helios integration environment.

Project Helios is NovaBridge’s enterprise data integration platform, purpose-built to streamline ERP ingestion, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean, reliable data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Given Meridian’s focus on dependable live-data pipelines and a smooth, efficient path to UAT, we are confident Helios will provide the visibility, control, and performance your team needs from day one.

Getting Started:

Your access credentials and detailed onboarding documentation will follow under separate cover within the next 24 hours.

To ensure a seamless onboarding, we have outlined the next steps we discussed:

1. Integration Environment Setup: Please share Meridian’s IT infrastructure diagram by July 12, 2026.
2. UAT Environment Access: Your team to kindly provision UAT environment access by July 19, 2026.
3. Stakeholder Demo Preparation: We will collaborate to resolve any remaining setup items ahead of our joint stakeholder demo on July 25, 2026.

Your Dedicated Contacts:

For any technical questions or integration guidance, please contact Derek Okafor, Technical Lead, at d.okafor@novabridge.com.

For project coordination, timelines, or scheduling, please contact me directly at s.chen@novabridge.com.

Derek and I are here to make your transition as smooth as possible and are happy to assist at any stage.

Thank you again for choosing to partner with NovaBridge. We truly value the opportunity to work with you and look forward to a successful collaboration.

Warm regards,

Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com
